context: An elderly man sits at a cafe table and enjoys a well-made hamburger in a calm social setting.

actions.description: The camera settles on the elderly gentleman holding the burger over the white plate.
He lifts the burger slightly and studies the layers with a pleased expression.
He brings it closer as warm cafe light glows over the table and background.
